violations.text: Allergen statement was missing on take-out menus. Marketing was contacted during inspeciton. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the funnel cake funnel and cambro containers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Menu boards and/or order station are lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Cheeses were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold drawer, and an ambient of 50 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC adjusted temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The dish washer (employed by facility management) was observed drying clean and sanitized dishes with a cloth towel. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
